_note: Copy this file to your project root as ds-config.json and fill in your values.

figma._modes_note: Define all your DS modes here. cssSelector values: 'root', 'dark-media', 'high-contrast-media', 'class:<name>', 'data:<attr>=<val>'
figma._legacy_note: OR use the legacy two-mode shorthand (ignored when 'modes' is present):

_visual_note: Directory for stored reference screenshots. Commit this dir to track visual history.
_webhook_note: Config for webhook-server.mjs. Run setup-webhook.mjs to register with Figma.
